message:
style: apply cargo fmt to fnx-python and fnx-algorithms + refresh Cargo.lock

Reflow long multi-arg calls to single-line form where rustfmt prefers the
tighter shape (betweenness_centrality_subset and edge_betweenness_centrality_subset
variants for PyGraph/PyDiGraph/PyGraphView paths in fnx-python), and compress the
EdgeCentralityScore struct-literal in edge_betweenness_centrality_subset_generic
down to the one-line idiom. These are pure formatter churn — no logic or ordering
changes — produced by `cargo fmt` running on top of the 0.3 asupersync bump.

Cargo.lock regenerates to pick up the dependency rev/versions that flowed in via
acd4c08 (asupersync 0.2 → 0.3) and adjacent transitive refreshes; no direct crate
adds or removes here.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
